Class ExteriorBehaviour

ISILab.LBS.Behaviours

LBS.dll
[RequieredModule(new Type[] { typeof(TileMapModule), typeof(ConnectedTileMapModule) })]
public class ExteriorBehaviour : LBSBehaviour, ICloneable, IBlueprintable
